message:
test(conformance): add edge case fixtures for timestamps and long segments

Adds three new conformance fixtures to cover gaps identified in COVERAGE.md:

- nonfinite_timestamp_invariants.json: Tests null timestamp handling
- long_segment_duration.json: Tests 10-minute segment tolerance
- timestamp_none_vs_some_mismatch.json: Tests Some/None timestamp mismatch

These fixtures extend coverage for Section 1 (Segment Timestamp Invariants)
edge cases that were previously only covered by unit tests.

Closes: bd-sfsj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,63 @@
+{
+  "name": "long_segment_duration",
+  "tolerance": {
+    "timestamp_tolerance_sec": 0.1,
+    "require_text_exact": true,
+    "require_speaker_exact": false
+  },
+  "policy": {
+    "allow_overlap": false,
+    "epsilon": 0.1
+  },
+  "expected": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.0,
+      "end_sec": 60.0,
+      "text": "First minute of transcription with multiple sentences.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_00",
+      "confidence": 0.95
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 60.0,
+      "end_sec": 300.0,
+      "text": "Extended segment covering five minutes of continuous speech without natural pause points.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_00",
+      "confidence": 0.92
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 300.0,
+      "end_sec": 600.0,
+      "text": "Final segment spanning five minutes, testing tolerance for long-form transcription segments.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_01",
+      "confidence": 0.88
+    }
+  ],
+  "observed": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.05,
+      "end_sec": 60.0,
+      "text": "First minute of transcription with multiple sentences.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_00",
+      "confidence": 0.94
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 60.05,
+      "end_sec": 300.0,
+      "text": "Extended segment covering five minutes of continuous speech without natural pause points.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_00",
+      "confidence": 0.91
+    },
+    {
+      "start_sec": 300.05,
+      "end_sec": 600.0,
+      "text": "Final segment spanning five minutes, testing tolerance for long-form transcription segments.",
+      "speaker": "SPEAKER_01",
+      "confidence": 0.87
+    }
+  ],
+  "expect_within_tolerance": true,
+  "expect_invariants_pass": true,
+  "expected_timestamp_violations": 0,
+  "expected_text_mismatches": 0,
+  "expected_speaker_mismatches": 0
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+{
+  "name": "nonfinite_timestamp_invariants",
+  "tolerance": {
+    "timestamp_tolerance_sec": 0.05,
+    "require_text_exact": true,
+    "require_speaker_exact": false
+  },
+  "expected": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.0,
+      "end_sec": 1.0,
+      "text": "valid segment",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.9
+    }
+  ],
+  "observed": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": null,
+      "end_sec": null,
+      "text": "valid segment",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": 0.9
+    }
+  ],
+  "expect_within_tolerance": false,
+  "expect_invariants_pass": true,
+  "expected_timestamp_violations": 1,
+  "expected_text_mismatches": 0,
+  "expected_speaker_mismatches": 0
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+{
+  "name": "timestamp_none_vs_some_mismatch",
+  "tolerance": {
+    "timestamp_tolerance_sec": 0.05,
+    "require_text_exact": true,
+    "require_speaker_exact": false
+  },
+  "expected": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": 0.0,
+      "end_sec": 1.0,
+      "text": "segment with timestamps",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": null
+    }
+  ],
+  "observed": [
+    {
+      "start_sec": null,
+      "end_sec": 1.0,
+      "text": "segment with timestamps",
+      "speaker": null,
+      "confidence": null
+    }
+  ],
+  "expect_within_tolerance": false,
+  "expect_invariants_pass": true,
+  "expected_timestamp_violations": 1,
+  "expected_text_mismatches": 0,
+  "expected_speaker_mismatches": 0
+}
